TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Thailand, title = Thailand, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Thailand} }

S.FORM: Thailand hya' ga cyux maki' tay 15 00 N, 100 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 513,120 sq km (maki' tay 51ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 510,890 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 2,230 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 68,200,824. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 41.20% , lhlahuy hya' ga 37.20%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 21.60%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Bangkok. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 5 na tay mawpuw sazing byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Vajiralongkorn, aring ryax 13 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部

Thailand hya' ga cyux maki' tay 15 00 N, 100 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 513,120 sq km (maki' tay 51ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 510,890 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 2,230 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 68,200,824. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 41.20% , lhlahuy hya' ga 37.20%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 21.60%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Bangkok. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 5 na tay mawpuw sazing byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Vajiralongkorn, aring ryax 13 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部
S.PHON: tħailan* ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj ** ** n, *** ** e na azijaʔ s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ ***,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj **ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa ***,*** s~ɕq km , kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa *,*** s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa **,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa **.**% , lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa βaŋkok. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa * na taj mawpuw s~ɕaziŋ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *ajiraloŋkorn, ariŋ rjax ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
